Document:
# Core Rule 9 - No sharing or using multiple accounts [color=SlateGray][italic]Revision A, 2025-10-11[/italic][/color]
Sharing or using multiple accounts results in penalties for all accounts.
All account users are penalized for the actions of other users on their account.
## Switching accounts You may change your username at https://account.spacestation14.com/Identity/Account/Manage
If you lose or abandon your account, you must notify admins of your old username at https://forum.spacestation14.com/c/general/help/46 as soon as you create a new account.
